title: Spandam’s Frame-Up
description: Franky tries to stop the train carrying Tom away, and the tragedy transforms Cutty Flam into the man who will become Franky.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 19, this part follows Franky, Iceburg, Tom, Spandam, Yokozuna. Franky tries to stop the train carrying Tom away, and the tragedy transforms Cutty Flam into the man who will become Franky.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter what you build, frankly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: can be revived with this thing.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Who did it come to try!?

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Hey, wait!!! What did Tom-San do!!?

dialogue.speaker: Yokozuna
dialogue.text: It's OK, don't worry about it.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It was only a matter of time.

summary: Franky tries to stop the train carrying Tom away, and the tragedy transforms Cutty Flam into the man who will become Franky.
